reviews.review_description: Nice creepy puzzle game
Horror and story telling in Vr. Very exciting and not too long. Easy to jump in and out perfect for casual gamers. We all do not have time to spend 3 hours playing games each day.

What a haunting experience. The graphics for mobile are some of the best I’ve seen, and it drips with atmosphere. It keeps you wondering what’s going on and by the time you do it takes a turn yet again. It seems to have different outcomes depending on choices you make for replay ability. On top of that there’s a new game plus as well after finishing the game. It’s psychological horror done right....and FREE!! Get it now if you love VR horror.

Interesting experience. I shall most likely play it through again at least once. Parts of it also make an interesting demo to introduce people to VR for the first time. It probably ranks around 3.5 to 4 stars in my opinion but.... when the developers provide this free of charge you have to give them the extra stars. Thank you! Will be looking for your next title!

I havent tried it yet but i am seeing these ridiculous reviews saying take our money this shouldn't be free!! ???  Be greatful they put out a quality free app considering most people dont care for the VR because cheap apps is all you get for free. They usually suck and discourage prospective vr buyers when trying out a free app because you figure they are all like the crap app they try out. Truth is most vr apps Payed and free. Suck so bad. So please try not to mess this up for the rest of us. Enjoy your free app and shut up about making this a Paid App

If you ever wondered how it must feel to exist inside a David Lynch film, here is your opportunity. The atmosphere amazed me since the very beginning. It's not much of a game, but more of an interactive story that magically unfolds all around you. The experience is absolutely immersing and I could not let it go until I reached the end. From the technical side it is also superb. Very original and rich environments, perfect sound design - the best I've seen (well.. heard) in VR so far -, and the visuals are as stunning as they are creative. A beautiful surreal experience, as engaging as its originality.
Wow this experience is just amazing, the suspense, atmosphere, everything fits perfectly. I highly recommend this game. I wouldn’t mind paying for this type of experience. Great job developers!
Wont start.

It's categorised as horror, but it's not. It is however, very creepy. The game is artful and overflowing with atmosphere and intrigue. I thoroughly enjoyed playing it, but was left dissatisfied in the end as it's simply too much of an enigma. It's all question and no answer. However, since it's free I would highly recommend playing it. It's fun in itself and gives an inkling of what to expect in a similar game from the same devs: Angest.  That game is longer and while still packed with mystery and puzzlement definitely leaves you with more of a story.
The environment is quite nice but the teleportation and interactions get annoying quickly. I stoped playing after a while because I was bored.
higrcv

I really like the design of this experience, the hotel scenes are stunning and beautifully designed. The actual story content isn't that scary, but the graphics and effects make it very much worth watching.
The title says it all! Seriously did you read it?
Feels very polished. Would recommend.
This is more like an experience than a game. It does have some creepy moments. Not any jump scares but just a bit of uneasiness while going through this.
have only played the 3 chapter preview so far but had chills down my spine pretty much the whole time. it looks beautiful, it's hard to believe this is a free game.

Let me start with this: It's not scary. It's not laughably non scary tho, it even got me to jump a bit.  I played on Quest so I was able to move my head and really appreciate the smaller details crammed into this tiny package. My 2 big issues were these: 1. There is clearly a story trying to be told here but it's so all over the place that you can't tell what's going on. 2. The game is SHORT. Like less than an hour of content is in here, but it's all very well done!

reviews.review_title: It just didn't do it for me
reviews.review_description: Great graphics but I wasn't scared. I wouldn't call this horror. It's more like a mystery.
This is my first review, but this was the best free game I've played in VR and at the end it looks like even more to play, but I'll be buying more like this very soon. Great job guys!
I loved the game had a story and jump scars but it was short
